'''Alvorine''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Yminis sector/Legends|Yminis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Description==
[[File:Alvorine_map.jpg|thumb|left|225px|[[Map/Legends|Map]] of Alvorine]]
Alvorine was a mid-sized [[Planet/Legends|world]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the three blue-white [[Star/Legends|stars]] of the [[Alvorine system/Legends|Alvorine system]]. It was known for its [[Color/Legends|colorful]] [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]] and its large [[Crystal/Legends|crystalline]] spires.<ref name="THH" />

Alvorine had one major [[City/Legends|city]], [[Alvorine City]], which hosted the [[Government Offices]] of the [[Alvorine Authority]] and the [[Alvorine Authority Security Office]] of the [[Authority Security Forces]]. A separate [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], [[Alvorine Spaceport]], was located on a mesa 20 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] north of the city.<ref name="THH" />

==History==
Alvorine sat in an area of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] that was explored sometime between [[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]] and [[8000 BBY]].<ref name="TEA" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Alvorine was the base of operations of [[Krova (Hutt)|Krova]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Krova's criminal empire|criminal empire]]. During that [[Time/Legends|time]], the Hutt [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] made a tidy profit selling information to both sides of the conflict, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Krova was personally responsible for the [[Massacre at Kolanda Station]] on [[Latharra]].<ref name="THH" />

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the collapse of the Empire in this area of space, Alvorine became a member of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Krova the Hutt was declared a war criminal for selling information on the Rebel Alliance to the Empire, and a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was placed on her head. As a result, Krova fled Alvorine before she was captured and abandoned much of her wealth to the planetary government, the Alvorine Authority.<ref name="THH" />

Krova was later captured by the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Langro Dis]] in the [[Pluthan system/Legends|Pluthan system]], near the [[Pluthan asteroid belt]]. The Hutt crime lord was then brought to Alvorine for trial.<ref name="THH" />

It wasn't long before Krova the Hutt attracted the attention of a group of [[darksider]]s, who were looking for a [[Krova's holocron|Sith holocron]] in her possession.<ref name="THH" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Alvorine was created for the short story "[[The Hutt Hit]]," published in the [[Star Wars Gamer 5|fifth edition]] of [[Star Wars Gamer]].
